recent_excerpts: The Kyber ransomware gang is using a variant that implements Kyber1024 post-quantum encryption to target Windows and VMware ESXi systems, according to a BleepingComputer analysis.

The Gentlemen ransomware-as-a-service operation has infected over 320 victims, deploying separate encryptors for Windows/Linux and VMware ESXi systems to maximize disruption and ransom pressure on ent
CVE-2026-1731, a critical 9.8 CVSS flaw in BeyondTrust's Bomgar RMM, is being actively exploited to deploy ransomware and compromise IT service providers in global supply chain attacks.
